operating_principle: Bulk ingest is for bootstrap. Delta sync is for normal operations.
current_assumption: The database is mostly populated; normal refresh should identify deltas, missing data, stale data, and repair candidates rather than reprocessing all content.

delta_questions: Which streams are new?
Which streams disappeared or became unavailable?
Which category/bouquet/access mappings changed?
Which logo/artwork values are missing, inaccessible, or changed?
Which EPG channel IDs are missing or no longer joining?
Which dedupe/canonical mappings need refresh?
live.normal_action: Refresh only changed/new/stale Live rows and availability/cache records.
live.fallback_action: Full Live refresh only when snapshot identity drift or schema drift is detected.

delta_questions: Which VOD IDs are new?
Which VOD IDs disappeared or became stale?
Which title/container/category fields changed?
Which rows have missing or bad artwork?
Which rows have missing or stale TMDb/enriched metadata?
Which rows need playability/access validation?
vod.normal_action: Queue only new/stale/missing VOD metadata, artwork, and playability work.
vod.fallback_action: Full VOD refresh only when provider catalog identity changed massively or local catalog is missing.

delta_questions: Which series IDs are new?
Which series IDs disappeared or became stale?
Which seasons or episodes are new?
Which episode IDs/container extensions changed?
Which series are missing season/episode structure?
Which series need artwork/metadata repair?
series.normal_action: Update only changed series parents, seasons, episodes, metadata, and artwork candidates.
series.fallback_action: Use old grinder logic only as evidence/reference or when provider structure changes.

delta_questions: Did the XMLTV file hash change?
Which channel IDs are new, removed, or renamed?
Which program windows are new or changed?
Which EPG joins are missing or broken?
Is the current guide horizon stale?
Does import need reset, continue, or skip?
epg.normal_action: Import only if file hash/range changed or guide horizon is stale.
epg.fallback_action: Full EPG import only when reset is intentional or join validation fails broadly.
